top_signals.title: Gold Drops Below $4,100 as Tech Selloff, Inflation Hit Sentiment
top_signals.summary: Gold fell for a second day, under pressure from a stronger US dollar and a tech-led selloff in equities that’s prompted investors to cut bullion holdings and cover losses elsewhere.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: AI boom sees investors shift from Japan’s value to growth stocks
top_signals.summary: Investors had classified Japan's equities as low-growth value stocks, but the rising prominence of high-growth firms suggests a meaningful shift in the investment narrative.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The Exploit Doesn't Exist. You Can Still Prove It Works Against You
top_signals.summary: Attackers can now weaponize newly disclosed vulnerabilities far faster than most organizations can patch them. Picus Security explains how security teams can validate exploitability before a public exploit even exists. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
